nasb.text: There is an outcry in the streets concerning the wine; All joy turns to gloom. The gaiety of the earth is banished.

esv.text: There is an outcry in the streets for lack of wine; all joy has grown dark; the gladness of the earth is banished.

cnv.text: 有人在街上因無酒呼喊； 一切喜樂都已過去， 地上的喜樂都消逝了。

ccb.text: 人们因无酒而在街上喊叫； 一切欢乐变作哀愁， 地上喜乐不复存在。

csbs.text: 街上有为酒哭喊的声音； 一切欢乐都已黯淡， 地上的喜乐都已离去。
